features: ‚úØ A GIFT THEY'LL ACTUALLY LOVE - Score a world-class winner with this signed printed photo of one of the most famous football legends in the world, Harry Maguire. Premier present for them and top present-giving points to you ‚Äì back of the net!

‚úØ YOU WON'T FIND A BETTER PRODUCT FOR THE PRICE - Just like the real thing but without the cost, Fans and collectors of any age will be delighted to receive this authentic-looking display that makes for a unique addition to their collectors' memorabilia

‚úØ ARRIVES READY TO GIVE AS A GIFT - Our A4 (297x210mm) prints come framed in a sleek an A4 Black Polycarbonate frame that compliments the matt mount display. Lightweight, but of the highest quality - Simply perfect for a birthday, Christmas, or any kind of gift!

A simply great Gift Idea!

Compare Our Sizes A4 Print 210 x 297 mm (8.3 x 11.7 inches) Print Only A4 Print Framed 210 x 297 mm (8.3 x 11.7 inches) Print Size / Overall size including Frame = 330 x 242 x 15 mm (13 x 9.5 x 0.5 inches) A3 Print Framed 297 x 420 mm (11.7 x 16.5 inches) Print Size / Overall size including Frame = 446 x 330 15 mm (17.5 x 13 x 0.5 inches) A2 Print Framed 420 x 594 mm (16.5 x 23.4 inches) Print Size / Overall size including Frame = 642 x 470 x 15 mm (25.25 x 18.5 x 0.5 inches) Does this have a glass in the frame? All framed items include a crystal-clear acrylic front that protects the print and keeps it clean, offering the same look as glass but with added durability. Is the autograph printed or an original? Each autograph is a high-quality printed replica of the original signature, not a hand-signed autograph. Can the back of the frame be opened? Yes, the back of the frame can be opened by gently lifting the metal fixing lugs and removing the ridged backing board. Do you offer this frame in different colours? E.g. White The frame is only available in black and cannot be customised or supplied in white. Can this item be personalised? At the moment, we don‚Äôt offer personalisation, but it‚Äôs a feature we plan to introduce soon.
